features: PROFESSIONAL RESULTS AT HOME – Achieve volume, curls, and bounce with this 2-in-1 styling set. It features a comfortable grip handle with 6 interchangeable 38mm round brush barrels, and 6 styling clips.

EFFORTLESS STYLING - Each barrel is light and easy to use, ensuring even heat distribution without weighing down your hair. It's ideal for creating lasting body and shape, particularly for short to medium length hair.

COMFORT AND PRECISION - Gentle yet effective, the smooth nylon bristles help grip hair securely while preventing tangles, while the non-slip handle offers comfort and precision for both beginners and pros.
STYLING CLIPS INCLUDED - The 6 styling clips help you to section hair easily for better styling control, allowing you to blow-dry in sections for smoother, more voluminous results.
BAUER PROFESSIONAL – Bauer Professional is the leading manufacturer of top-quality hair, beauty & personal care products. Browse the whole range at the Bauer Professional page on Amazon today.
description: Product Description Previous page Have A Great Hair Day Achieve volume, curls, and bounce to last all day. 6 Interchangeable Heads It's simple to secure each brush head to the handle, then release when you're ready to swap out. Non-Slip Handle Offers comfort and precision for both beginners and pros. 6 Styling Clips Section hair easily for better styling control.
